Capabilities

From substrate to finished reel - in-house.

A Korean-built coating line, rotogravure printing and precision slitting let us control quality end to end, backed by a distribution network across India's leading mills.

Extrusion Coating & Lamination

Our state-of-the-art extrusion lamination and coating line - imported from Korea - applies LDPE and specialty polymer layers across a wide range of substrates to deliver moisture, grease and oxygen barriers for primary packaging.

Rotogravure Printing

Our rotogravure press delivers consistent, high-volume print quality on films, foils and papers - ideal for branded flexible packaging and pharmaceutical laminates.

Slitting & Rewinding

Jumbo rolls are converted into precise, customer-specified reel widths and lengths, plain or printed, with tight tolerance and clean edges.

Paper Distribution

Beyond manufacturing, we are authorized distributors for multiple Indian paper mills - supplying MG Poster, Maplitho, Cupstock, MG/MF Kraft, Greaseproof, Chromo, Glassine, Duplex, FBB, SBS and more.

Substrates we handle

One coating line, many materials.

We poly-coat and laminate across a broad substrate range - letting you consolidate barrier, print and structure with one partner.

  • Paper & paperboard (all grades)
  • Cupstock paper
  • Polyester (PET) & BOPP film
  • Aluminium foils - plain & printed
  • Fabrics & specialty substrates
Capacity & reach

Scaled for serious volume.

30+Years of expertise
20+Countries served
425+Clients worldwide

Need a custom coated laminate?

Share your structure and barrier requirements - we'll engineer the right build.

KPK P Packaging

A three-decade family business converting and distributing coated papers and flexible packaging for pharma, food and FMCG - in India and 20+ countries.
